calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gloria Park, via Zoom, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

The court points to the various issues including, but not limited to, sending personal property to Korea to hold until final distribution is ordered, and the request for fees associated with the cleaning of the decedent's residence. Ms. Park reports that the heirs had agreed to the to the plan to ship the items to Korea. Ms. Park advises that she researched rates for similar services and declares that the rates she paid are less than what she found. Ms. Park reports that decedent was an artist and that it was difficult to carefully sort and pack his artwork. Ms. Park offers additional advocacy on behalf of the request for fees.

The court acknowledges Ms. Park's advocacy and takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
